docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY MORRIS, GLORIA AS TO DEFENDANT HAYWOOD, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-30-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
